method.name: deterministic_process_redesign_review
method.decision_policy: Use process ledger entries, tasklist stages, generated artifacts, final summaries, and active design documents to recommend which stages should be kept, merged, reordered, turned into loops, or held as review-only gates.

what_is_ready: Workbook structure, visual evidence, formula/pivot dataflow, table I/O pipelines, document ontology mapping, actionable review items, validated graph, data views, local semantic candidates, and shared alignment blockers are represented as traceable artifacts.
44 data views are projected for review.
what_is_not_ready: Official K-IFRS revenue output is not authoritative until output basis, aggregation rule, and Excel-engine formula results are confirmed.
Shared ontology promotion is blocked because local boundary, local source, repeated workbook-family evidence, shared target checks, and human approval are missing.
final_assessment.recommended_default_next_step: Use the redesigned pipeline on a second workbook or source/output pair while collecting local-domain and formula-result authority evidence.

rationale: The stage produced reusable evidence for downstream parser decisions.
recommended_changes: Keep the stage with current authority boundaries.
completion_guard: Output artifact exists and is schema-validated when a schema exists.

rationale: Hidden rows, filters, outline state, and view offsets affected later capture behavior.
The process already corrected this by adding early view-state preflight.
recommended_changes: Keep this immediately after fast manifest and before sampling/capture planning.
Do not reveal hidden content by default; preserve source-visible authority.
completion_guard: Hidden/filter/outline/pane state is inventoried before capture planning.
Source-visible authority is preserved.

rationale: The stage produced reusable evidence for downstream parser decisions.
recommended_changes: Keep the stage with current authority boundaries.
completion_guard: Output artifact exists and is schema-validated when a schema exists.

stage_reviews.current_stage: Pivot / formula / external reference profiling and formula/dataflow graph extraction
rationale: The stage produced reusable evidence for downstream parser decisions.
recommended_changes: Keep the stage with current authority boundaries.
completion_guard: Formula references, external workbook references, pivot cache sources, and repeated formula signatures are indexed.

rationale: Row-band seeds were useful but insufficient because row and column boundaries can both split tables.
2D cell regions are the durable object; row bands should remain only early seeds.
recommended_changes: Merge initial block candidates and 2D segmentation into one region-candidate stage with substeps.
Retain row-band evidence as a seed property, not the final unit.
completion_guard: Output artifact exists and is schema-validated when a schema exists.

rationale: Style and merged-cell evidence materially improves split/merge boundary ranking.
recommended_changes: Run structural style profiling before final split/merge boundary gates.
completion_guard: Output artifact exists and is schema-validated when a schema exists.

rationale: Capture, quality checks, recapture, view-state reconciliation, coordinate normalization, and visual features form an iterative evidence loop.
Recapture experiments improved some wide-range captures but did not resolve hidden/filter authority cases.
recommended_changes: Represent as a loop with explicit exit criteria instead of a strictly linear chain.
Keep reveal/clear-filter variants diagnostic and non-authoritative.
completion_guard: Output artifact exists and is schema-validated when a schema exists.

rationale: Gate, boundary, and role decisions must remain separate from raw evidence extraction.
recommended_changes: Keep accepted/review/rejected statuses distinct from final graph claims.
Let formula and pivot authority support role labels even when visual evidence remains partial.
completion_guard: Output artifact exists and is schema-validated when a schema exists.

rationale: General-domain sources helped LLM proposal grounding, while deterministic validation quarantined local-boundary-sensitive claims.
recommended_changes: Keep LLM output proposal-only.
Require deterministic source, domain, conflict, formula/pivot topology, and local-boundary gates before graph membership.
completion_guard: Output artifact exists and is schema-validated when a schema exists.

rationale: Validated graph, data views, local candidates, and shared alignment separated accepted structure from semantic review queues.
recommended_changes: Do not promote local candidates to shared ontology until boundary/source/repetition/conflict/formula/human gates pass.
Add explicit K-GAAP/K-IFRS basis review for revenue candidates.
completion_guard: Output artifact exists and is schema-validated when a schema exists.

rationale: The ledger exposed ordering mistakes, useful loops, and visual-review failures.
recommended_changes: Run after each sample workbook and before locking the next process version.
completion_guard: Review recommendations are written to artifact, docs, viewer, and ledger.

recommended_pipeline.why: Large-file and package risk preflight.
Human-visible state must be known before sampling/capture interpretation.
Values and formula text preview without mutating source workbook.
Dataflow, pivot cache, external link, and formula pattern authority.
Style/merge/dimension evidence before region boundary decisions.
Combine row-band seeds and 2D region segmentation into one candidate model.
Conservative candidate ranking before acceptance.
Table-level input/output pipeline projection over formula and pivot authority.
Plan visual/formula/pipeline gates before capture.
Capture, quality, recapture, view-state reconciliation, normalization, and visual features.
Evidence statuses, not final graph claims.
Decision layer over gates, boundary candidates, formula, and pivot authority.
Single parser input authority.
Document-structure ontology utilization.
Actionable ontology handoff for unresolved claims.
Separate general-domain and local-domain evidence.
Interpretation only; no acceptance.
Gate LLM claims before graph membership.
Accepted graph plus carry-forward queues.
Reviewer-friendly read model over accepted graph.
Boundary-scoped candidates only.
Promotion blocked until evidence gates pass.
Generated review surfaces need layout QA.
Use ledger to redesign pipeline after each sample.

redesign_decisions.decision: Move and keep view-state preflight at the beginning.
redesign_decisions.effect: Capture planning and visual absence claims must know visible-state authority first.

redesign_decisions.decision: Treat row bands as seeds and 2D cell regions as the durable boundary object.
evidence: The user identified that column boundaries and adjacent-but-separate regions can both exist.
redesign_decisions.effect: Merge row-band and 2D segmentation implementation as one candidate model.

redesign_decisions.decision: Model render capture, quality, recapture, view-state reconciliation, coordinate normalization, and visual feature detection as one loop.
evidence: Recapture improved wide-range cases but not hidden/filter cases.
Visual feature detection depends on quality and view-state authority.
redesign_decisions.effect: A capture target exits the loop only when it is usable, blocked by source-visible view-state, or explicitly carried as review-required.

redesign_decisions.decision: Keep shared ontology alignment review-only until promotion prerequisites pass.
redesign_decisions.effect: No shared ontology write path should run for this sample yet.

redesign_decisions.decision: Add an explicit Excel-engine recalculation gate before numeric formula-result claims.
redesign_decisions.effect: Formula text remains evidence only until recalculated through Microsoft Excel or an approved equivalent authority.

redesign_decisions.decision: Add a lightweight viewer layout gate for dense review sections.
evidence: Stage 27 shared alignment section required a layout repair after user review.
redesign_decisions.effect: Generated HTML review surfaces must be checked for overflow and overlap.

open_evidence_gaps.gap: Local domain boundary is not confirmed.
No local policy, glossary, or owner-approved vocabulary source is available.
16 accepted data-view surfaces need semantic labels.
No repeated workbook-pair or workbook-family evidence has been supplied.

next_iteration_plan.name: Apply redesigned ordering to the next workbook or workbook pair.
next_iteration_plan.done_when: The pipeline starts with manifest, view-state preflight, sampling, formula/pivot profiling, and style profiling before region segmentation.

next_iteration_plan.name: Collect local-domain evidence.
next_iteration_plan.done_when: A boundary and local vocabulary/policy source are attached before semantic acceptance.

next_iteration_plan.name: Run Excel-engine formula-result validation on selected revenue outputs.
next_iteration_plan.done_when: Numeric formula claims have recalculated Excel evidence or remain explicitly blocked.

next_iteration_plan.name: Define K-GAAP/K-IFRS output basis.
next_iteration_plan.done_when: Revenue surfaces are classified as K-GAAP output, K-IFRS support, or bridge with human-approved aggregation rules.

next_iteration_plan.name: Add viewer layout QA to new dense sections.
next_iteration_plan.done_when: Generated HTML sections pass desktop and mobile overflow checks.

parser_observations.message: Reviewed 34 process ledger entries and 58 generated artifacts.
5 high-priority evidence gaps remain before semantic promotion or official numeric claims.
Process recommendations are not parser truth; they must be applied and tested on the next workbook iteration.
